description: Registry of all numerical simulation runs for TimesArrow project

runs.description: 2D square lattice Z₂ LGT, L=8, critical β identification

results.keyFinding: Confirmed β_c ≈ 0.44 from exact solution by Osterwalder-Seiler

runs.description: Rust implementation benchmark, validated against TypeScript

results.keyFinding: Rust implementation validated, ready for production runs

runs.description: Finite-size scaling, L=8, 200k sweeps, dense β grid

results.keyFinding: Clean data, monotonic plaquette increase with β

runs.description: Finite-size scaling, L=12, 200k sweeps, dense β grid

results.keyFinding: Binder cumulant shows stronger finite-size effects than L=8

runs.description: Finite-size scaling, L=16, 200k sweeps, dense β grid
Finite-size scaling, L=20, 200k sweeps, dense β grid

results.keyFinding: Specific heat peak around β ≈ 0.5, excellent precision (~0.03% error)

runs.description: Finite-size scaling, L=24, 200k sweeps, dense β grid

results.keyFinding: Largest lattice, strongest finite-size effects, clean data
Sharp transition at β ≈ 0.70, plaquette jumps from 0.5 to 1.0
Susceptibility peaks at β=0.75, χ=0.519, transition sharpens with L

results.note: Odd number of half-integer spins cannot couple to J=0
Singlet subspace dimension = 5. Generic geometric embedding (triangular prism).
